textPlain: I created transcript for it for anyone wanting to read instead of listen!https://videotobe.com/play/youtube/hS1YqcewH0c
I live-blogged the keynote here, adding a little bit of extra commentary and links along the way: https://simonwillison.net/2025/Oct/6/openai-devday-live-blog...
The "live" coding demo felt very staged with codex reasoning set at "low" and everything working ootb.

"Sam says today Codex is out of preview and into GA. But which one! Codex CLI or Codex Cloud or both?"The cloud version as "Starting October 20, Codex cloud tasks will also begin counting towards your Codex usage"
Probably didn't want to risk the same embarrassment that was the Meta live demo.
